THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BLOOM, BRYCE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 54 FOURTH ST, ROOM #814 $1,073.83 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,073.83, STAYED UNTIL MAR-01-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN COSTS; SECURITY DEPOSIT TO BE RETAINED BY PLTF; PLTF. SHALL FILE A SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT IF DEFT. VACATES AND SURRENDERS KEYS TO PLTF. ON OR BEFORE 3/1/95, 9AM; (SEE FILE FOR DETAILS).
